summary: Comprehensive testing completed for weROI platform finalization. All backend APIs (100%) and frontend features working correctly. Mobile UI refinements verified (16px buttons, stacked forms, centered layout). Dual-trigger popup working (5-second timer + exit intent). Footer updated to social-only (© 2025 weROI + Instagram @weroi.co). Admin dashboard fully functional with password protection, stats, lead log table, and CSV export.

minor.issue: Emails fail to send with error: 'The gmail.com domain is not verified'. The SENDER_EMAIL (contact.weroi@gmail.com) domain needs to be verified on Resend dashboard or changed to a verified domain.

action_items: Verify sender domain on Resend dashboard (https://resend.com/domains) OR change SENDER_EMAIL to a verified domain to enable email sending
critical_code_review_comments: Resend email integration code is correct but requires domain verification on Resend dashboard. Current SENDER_EMAIL (contact.weroi@gmail.com) is not verified.
All other features working as expected - popup triggers, footer, admin dashboard, CSV export
seed_data_creation: Test leads created via pytest with TEST_ prefix for easy identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Email sending requires domain verification on Resend. Backend APIs: /api/leads/audit, /api/leads/guide, /api/admin/auth, /api/admin/dashboard-data, /api/leads/export/csv, /api/analytics/event, /api/analytics/stats. Frontend: Homepage with social-only footer (© 2025 weROI + Instagram @weroi.co), dual-trigger popup (5 seconds + exit intent), admin dashboard at /admin-dashboard with password protection.

backend_api: GET /api/ - Root endpoint returns weROI API message
POST /api/leads/audit - Creates audit lead with all fields
GET /api/leads/audit - Returns list of audit leads
POST /api/leads/guide - Creates guide lead with email sequence fields
GET /api/leads/guide - Returns list of guide leads
GET /api/leads/stats - Returns lead counts and recent leads
GET /api/admin/dashboard-data - Returns dashboard data with valid password
GET /api/leads/export/csv - Returns valid CSV with correct headers
frontend_features: Footer shows only © 2025 weROI and Instagram link (@weroi.co)
Popup triggers after 5 seconds on page load
Popup triggers on exit intent (mouse leaves top of window)
Mobile view (390px): buttons are 16px font, centered layout, stacked forms
Admin dashboard login page loads at /admin-dashboard
Admin dashboard authenticates with password weROI2025Admin!
Admin dashboard shows 4 stat cards: Page Views, Audit Leads, Guide Downloads, Conversion Rate
Admin dashboard Lead Log table shows columns: Date, Type, Name, Email, Company, Source, Status
Admin dashboard Export CSV button present and functional
Admin dashboard Analytics tab shows conversion funnel

notes.email_automation: Resend email integration is implemented correctly but requires domain verification. Error: 'The gmail.com domain is not verified'. To fix: Either verify the domain on Resend dashboard or use a verified domain as SENDER_EMAIL.
notes.popup_triggers: Dual-trigger popup working: 1) After 5 seconds, 2) Mouse leaves top of window. Only triggers once per session (stored in sessionStorage).
notes.admin_dashboard: Password-protected at /admin-dashboard. Shows Page Views, Audit Leads, Guide Downloads, Conversion Rate. Lead Log table with all required columns. CSV export functional.
